name: LIQUIDMETAL TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: Liquidmetal Technologies, Inc. is a materials technology and manufacturing company focused on developing and commercializing products made from proprietary amorphous alloys. The company leverages unique atomic structures in its Liquidmetal alloys to deliver superior strength, hardness, corrosion resistance, and net-shape molding capabilities. It pursues commercialization through its own manufacturing subsidiary in China, third-party manufacturing partners, and licensing arrangements targeting applications where amorphous alloys can replace titanium, stainless steel, and other high-performance crystalline materials.

products.name: Liquidmetal Bulk Amorphous Alloys
products.description: Proprietary amorphous alloys offering high strength, hardness, elasticity, corrosion resistance, and net-shape molding for precision components across various industries.

products.name: Thermoplastic Molded Components
products.description: Near-to-net shaped components produced via thermoplastic molding of bulk Liquidmetal alloys, reducing post-processing and machining costs.

partnerships.description: Liquidmetal holds an exclusive license from Caltech to commercialize bulk amorphous alloy technology first developed there in 1993.
